title: crotalaria dolichantha
intro: Crotalaria dolichantha, a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, is a shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria dolichantha include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as a treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
